title: Access to Monday.com labs
excerpt:
Hello, 
I’ve activated the Beta Columns, Views, and Widgets option in Monday.com labs but I do not seem to have access to any new functionality! 
How do I gain access to it? 
Ivan

posts.author: IvanRivera (Ivan Rivera)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’ve activated the Beta Columns, Views, and Widgets option in Monday.com labs but I do not seem to have access to any new functionality!

How do I gain access to it?

Ivan

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @IvanRivera

Right now there aren’t any beta views, widgets or columns for you to test. If we release any, you’ll see them if you have activated this in monday labs so stay tuned!
